items.html: Along the whole middle line of ZA [Zeir Anpin] she left a root, according as she went on growing. First she left her root in his Yesod — the discernment of the Atara [crown] in it — and she never moved from there. Afterwards she left a root behind the Sefira of his Tifferet, and she is never uprooted from there, even after she returned with him Panim be Panim [face-to-face], as it is written concerning "VaYaavor" ["and He passed"], which is an illumination for that discernment she left behind his Tifferet. She also has another root, higher still, behind the Daat of ZA; from there the discernment of Leah came out, and this is the root of Leah's emergence there.
